title: Add bounds checking to snprintf in coap_location.c and coap_msg.c
description: Audit snprintf calls, add strict error handling and bounds verification matching routes prefix pattern.
close_reason: Added strict snprintf bounds checking and error handling in build_base_name() matching the routes prefix pattern from coap_status.c:505-508. coap_msg.c already had the check. Verified via commit and build.
